summary: Seven mutation commands with all-optional body fields whose defaults are empty/zero now require at least one body flag (or --stdin) instead of silently sending an empty {} body.
reason: Repo-wide sweep of the change-password empty-'!stdinBody' pattern: these commands had no-op empty guards, so running them with no flags and no --stdin sent {} to the API and produced a cryptic 400. Commands whose flag defaults already populate the body (e.g. certificates renew/reissue with non-empty common-name/csr/root-type defaults) were left unchanged because they never emit an empty body.
